MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: BIS/BAS Child. Note that item-wise data is in the TSV file exactly as reponses were recorded, but item 5 was reverse-scored when taken into account for the total and average scores.
MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: For each item, indicate how much you agree or disagree with what the item says. Please respond to all items; do not leave any blank. Choose only one response to each statement. Please be as accurate and honest as you can be. Respond to each item as if it were the only item. Don't worry about being 'consistent' in your responses.

bisbas_child_1.Description: I usually get very tense when I think something unpleasant is going to happen.

bisbas_child_3.Description: I am hurt when people scold me or tell me that I do something wrong.

bisbas_child_4.Description: I feel pretty upset when I think that someone is angry with me.

bisbas_child_5.Description: I do not become fearful or nervous, even when something bad happens to me.

bisbas_child_6.Description: I feel worried when I think I have done poorly at something.

bisbas_child_7.Description: I am very fearful compared to my friends.

bisbas_child_8.Description: I feel excited and full of energy when I get something that I want.

bisbas_child_9.Description: When I am doing well at something, I like to keep doing this.

bisbas_child_10.Description: I get thrilled when good things happen to me.

bisbas_child_11.Description: I get very excited when I would win a contest.

bisbas_child_12.Description: I get really excited when I see an opportunity to get something I like.

bisbas_child_13.Description: When I want something, I usually go all the way to get it.

bisbas_child_14.Description: I do everything to get the things that I want.

bisbas_child_15.Description: When I see an opportunity to get something that I want, I go for it right away.

bisbas_child_16.Description: Nobody can stop me when I want something.

bisbas_child_17.Description: I often do things for no other reason that that they might be fun.

bisbas_child_18.Description: I crave for excitement and new sensations.

bisbas_child_19.Description: I am always willing to try something new, when I think it will be fun.

bisbas_child_20.Description: I often do things on the spur of the moment.

bissc_total.Description: Global score comprised of the sum of all items corresponding to behavioral inhibition system (items 1-7). n/a if any individual item 1-7 is n/a.

bas_drive.Description: Global score comprised of the sum of all items corresponding to behavioral activation system, drive scale (items 9-16). n/a if any individual item 9-16 is n/a.

bas_fs.Description: Global score comprised of the sum of all items corresponding to behavioral activation system, fun-seeking scale (items 17-20). n/a if any individual item 17-20 is n/a.

bas_rr.Description: Global score comprised of the sum of all items corresponding to behavioral activation system, reward responsiveness scale (items 8-12). n/a if any individual item 8-12 is n/a.

bas_total.Description: Global score comprised of the sum of all items corresponding to behavioral activation system (items 8-20). n/a if any individual item 8-20 is n/a.
